channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FILME] Filmcity Media Ltd. Announces Preferential Issue of Equity Shares, New Appointments, and Changes to MoA & AoA
item.description:
Filmcity Media Ltd. has announced a preferential issue of equity shares worth Rs. 1,90,00,000 to promoters and non-promoters. The company has also appointed Mr. Prabhat Modi as a Non-Executive Non Independent Director and Ms. Kirti Vishnu Tiwari as the Chief Financial Officer. Furthermore, the company has approved the appointment of M/s A. K. Choudhary & Associates as the Scrutinizer for the Postal Ballot and E-voting process. The Board of Directors has also approved changes to the Memorandum of Association and the Articles of Association.

  • Preferential issue of equity shares worth Rs. 1,90,00,000 to promoters and non-promoters.
  • Appointment of Mr. Prabhat Modi as a Non-Executive Non Independent Director.
  • Appointment of Ms. Kirti Vishnu Tiwari as the Chief Financial Officer.
  • Appointment of M/s A. K. Choudhary & Associates as the Scrutinizer for the Postal Ballot and E-voting process.
  • Approval of changes to the Memorandum of Association and the Articles of Association.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FILMCITY MEDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [MILESTONE] Milestone Global Ltd: Tek Chand Bhardwaj Re-Appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director for Second Term
item.description:
Milestone Global Ltd announced the re-appointment of Mr. Tek Chand Bhardwaj as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a second term of 5 consecutive years. The appointment will be effective from 13th March 2026, subject to the approval of shareholders in the ensuing Annual General Meeting. This disclosure was made in Form B as per Regulation 7(1)(b) of SEBI PIT Regulation, 2015.

  • Tek Chand Bhardwaj re-appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Appointment for a second term of 5 consecutive years
  • Effective from 13th March 2026
  • Subject to shareholders' approval in the Annual General Meeting
  • Disclosure made in Form B as per SEBI PIT Regulation, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MILESTONE GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HALDER] Halder Venture Ltd Receives Disclosure from Prakruti Commosale Private Limited for Sale of 18,156 Equity Shares
item.description:
Halder Venture Ltd has received a disclosure from Prakruti Commosale Private Limited, a Promoter Group, regarding the sale of 18,156 equity shares of the company. The disclosure was made under Regulation 7(2) read with Regulation 6(2) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The disclosure was made on 13.03.2026. The securities held by the promoter before and after the transaction are 360000 shares (2.89%) and 341844 shares (2.74%) respectively.

  • Halder Venture Ltd received a disclosure from Prakruti Commosale Private Limited for the sale of 18,156 equity shares.
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 7(2) read with Regulation 6(2) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The sale of shares reduced the promoter's holding from 360000 shares (2.89%) to 341844 shares (2.74).
  • The disclosure was made on 13.03.2026.
  • Prakruti Commosale Private Limited is a Promoter Group of Halder Venture Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Halder Venture Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [MILESTONE] Milestone Global Ltd: Mr. Somendra Kumar Agarwal Re-Appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Milestone Global Ltd has received a disclosure from Mr. Somendra Kumar Agarwal in terms of Regulation 7(1)(b) of SEBI PIT Regulation. Mr. Agarwal has been re-appointed by the Board of Directors as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a second term of 5 consecutive years, effective from 13th March 2026, subject to the approval of shareholders in the ensuing Annual General Meeting. The disclosure was made in Form B of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Mr. Somendra Kumar Agarwal re-appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Re-appointment for a second term of 5 consecutive years
  • Effective from 13th March 2026
  • Subject to approval of shareholders in the ensuing Annual General Meeting
  • Disclosure made in terms of Regulation 7(1)(b) of SEBI PIT Regulation

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MILESTONE GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EMPIND] Empire Industries Appoints Hemant Kumar Bhardwaj as Divisional CEO of Proposed Medtech Division
item.description:
Empire Industries Ltd. has appointed Mr. Hemant Kumar Bhardwaj as the Divisional CEO of its proposed new Medtech Division. Mr. Bhardwaj, who holds a Post-Graduation in Life Sciences from D.A.V.V. Indore, M.P and a Sr. Leadership & Management Certificate Course from IIM- Indore, brings strategic planning, leadership experience, and risk management skills related to the medical device business. The appointment is effective from 13th March 2026.

  • Appointment of Hemant Kumar Bhardwaj as Divisional CEO of Proposed Medtech Division
  • Bhardwaj's educational background in Life Sciences and Management
  • His experience in strategic planning, leadership, and risk management in the medical device business
  • Effective date of the appointment: 13th March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EMPIRE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CAPPL] Caplin Steriles Limited Receives USFDA Approval for Potassium Phosphates Injection USP
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Caplin Steriles Limited, a subsidiary of Caplin Point Laboratories Limited, has received final approval from the USFDA for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) Potassium Phosphates Injection USP. This injection is a generic therapeutic equivalent version of the Reference Listed Drug (RLD) from Fresenius Kabi USA, LLC. The injection is used as a source of phosphorus in intravenous fluids to correct hypophosphatemia and as parenteral nutrition in adults and pediatric patients who cannot take oral supplements. According to IQVIA™, the injection had US sales of approximately $57 million for the 12-month period ending January 2026.

  • Caplin Steriles Limited receives final approval from USFDA for Potassium Phosphates Injection USP
  • Potassium Phosphates Injection USP is a generic therapeutic equivalent version of the Reference Listed Drug (RLD) from Fresenius Kabi USA, LLC
  • The injection is used as a source of phosphorus in intravenous fluids to correct hypophosphatemia and as parenteral nutrition in adults and pediatric patients
  • According to IQVIA™, the injection had US sales of approximately $57 million for the 12-month period ending January 2026
  • Caplin Steriles Limited is a fast growing sterile product manufacturing company approved by several regulatory agencies such as US FDA, EU-GMP, ANVISA and INVIMA

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAPLIN POINT LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [INDIACEM] Scheme of Amalgamation of India Cements Subsidiaries Sanctioned by NCLT
item.description:
🔥 Trending

India Cements Ltd has announced that the Scheme of Amalgamation of its wholly owned subsidiaries ICL Financial Services Limited, ICL International Limited, ICL Securities Limited and India Cements Infrastructures Limited has been sanctioned by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Chennai. The Appointed date of the Scheme is 1st January, 2025. The Company is awaiting the certified true copy of the Order to file it with the Registrar of Companies, Chennai for making the Scheme effective.

  • Scheme of Amalgamation of India Cements subsidiaries sanctioned by NCLT
  • Appointed date of the Scheme is 1st January, 2025
  • Awaiting certified true copy of the Order for filing with the Registrar of Companies, Chennai

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [UMESLTD] Usha Martin Education & Solutions Clarifies Price Movement Due to Market Conditions
item.description:
Usha Martin Education & Solutions Ltd. has clarified that the recent movement in its share price is due to market conditions and not due to any withheld information. The company has complied with all disclosure requirements under the SEBI regulations. The company has been asked to provide any information that may have a bearing on the price behavior in the scrip.

  • Usha Martin Education & Solutions clarifies that recent share price movement is due to market conditions
  • Company has complied with all disclosure requirements under SEBI regulations
  • Company asked to provide any information that may affect price behavior in the scrip

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Usha Martin Education & Solutions Limited | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SSMD] SSMD Agrotech India Completes First Phase of Namkeen Plant, Starts Roasted Chana Operations
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SSMD Agrotech India Ltd. has successfully completed the first phase of its Namkeen Manufacturing Plant setup, an objective of its Initial Public Offer (IPO). The Company has commenced operations at the Namkeen plant, marking a significant milestone in the implementation of the IPO project and enhancing its manufacturing capabilities in the food processing segment. Furthermore, the Company has initiated 'Roasted Chana' operations, expanding its product portfolio in the snack and processed food category. This development is expected to enhance the Company's product offerings, operational capacity, and market presence in the food and agro-based product segment.

  • Completion of the first phase of the Namkeen Manufacturing Plant
  • Commencement of operations at the Namkeen plant
  • Introduction of 'Roasted Chana' to the product portfolio
  • Expansion in the snack and processed food category
  • Enhancement of product offerings, operational capacity, and market presence

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SSMD Agrotech India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GREAVESCOT] Greaves Cotton Appoints Manish Poddar as Group CFO, Succeeding Akhila Balachandar
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Greaves Cotton Limited, a leading diversified engineering company in India, has announced the appointment of Manish Poddar as its Group Chief Financial Officer. Manish, a Qualified Chartered Accountant with over 25 years of experience, will lead the Finance and IT functions and support the Greaves.NEXT strategy. He succeeds Akhila Balachandar, who is stepping down to pursue a new professional chapter. Manish has previously held senior leadership roles at Greencell Mobility, GMM Pfaudler Ltd., and Diversey, and has worked with promoter and Private Equity firms like Bain Capital and Chrys Capital.

  • Greaves Cotton appoints Manish Poddar as Group CFO
  • Manish Poddar has over 25 years of experience in financial leadership, strategy, and corporate governance
  • He has previously worked with companies like Greencell Mobility, GMM Pfaudler Ltd., and Diversey
  • He has also worked with promoter and Private Equity firms like Bain Capital and Chrys Capital
  • Manish succeeds Akhila Balachandar, who is stepping down to pursue a new professional chapter

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GREAVES COTTON LTD. | Category: Management Change
